title: Router RSSI value passed as 0 in process_dio, actual radio RSSI discarded
description: In rust/lichen-node/src/node.rs:299: 'self.router.process_dio(&dio, sender_addr, 0, now_ms)' - the rssi parameter is hardcoded to 0. The comment says 'ponytail: use 0 for rssi, real radio would provide it'. This means link quality estimation via RSSI is broken. The NeighborTable stores RSSI but it's always 0. A contributor adding RSSI-based parent selection won't realize the data is invalid. Either thread RSSI through from radio layer or remove RSSI from API to avoid false precision.
